hero.sub: Fullstack engineering focused on scalable systems, clean code and precise experiences — from a Go and Node back-end to React and Next.js on the front.
about.head: Driven by well-designed systems and the details that hold a product together.
about.p1: I am a fullstack developer focused on building web products end to end — modeling data, designing APIs in Go and Node, and shipping fast, accessible interfaces in React and Next.js. I pursue code that is predictable, observable and easy to maintain.
about.p2: I work with TypeScript end to end and value testing, performance and a developer experience that makes the next feature simpler than the last.
about.nowpost: , a B2B SaaS — from architecture to product.
proj.title: escuta...
proj.subtitle: Clinical Management System
proj.desc: A complete platform for clinical management. High-performance backend built in Go, relational database modeling and secure JWT authentication, with infrastructure split between Vercel and Render.
proj.soontxt: A modern web app with real-time cryptocurrency data integration powered by the CoinGecko API.
process.s1.d: I understand the problem, map requirements and define scope, success metrics and constraints.
process.s2.d: I model the domain and design the schema and service architecture before writing code.
process.s3.d: I build a type-safe back-end and front-end with modular, predictable code.
process.s4.d: I cover critical flows with tests and automate build, lint and tests in the pipeline.
process.s5.d: I ship with continuous deployment and monitor logs, metrics and alerts in production.
